problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
